evals.name: fr-008-five-noncompressibles-enumerated
evals.prompt: Verify that hf-ultrawork SKILL.md Hard Gates section locally enumerates all 5 non-compressible items per ADR-009 D2
evals.expected_behavior: 5 independent regex matches inside the Hard Gates section: Fagan review keyword, gate verdict keyword, closeout pack keyword, approval-artifact-disk-write keyword, standard-unclear-bounce keyword. Author cannot pass by writing only 'see ADR-009 D2'.
assertions: Hard Gates section contains 'Fagan review' or '8 个 Fagan' or 'hf-(spec|design|tasks|test|code|traceability|ui|discovery)-review'
Hard Gates section contains 'gate verdict' or '3 个 gate' or 'hf-(regression|doc-freshness|completion)-gate'
Hard Gates section contains 'closeout pack' or 'hf-finalize'
Hard Gates section contains approval + (disk|落盘|written|工件)
Hard Gates section contains 方向 / 取舍 / 标准 unclear / 标准不清 / stop and bounce

evals.name: keyword-set-three-categories
evals.prompt: Verify keyword set covers enable / pause / revert-to-standard 3 categories per OQ-003
evals.expected_behavior: SKILL.md contains at least one keyword from each of the 3 categories
assertions: enable category: auto mode | ultrawork | ulw | 自动执行 | 不要停下来 | keep going | proceed
pause category: 停 | 暂停 | pause | wait | hold on | stop
revert category: standard mode | 恢复 standard | revert to standard

evals.name: six-escape-conditions
evals.prompt: Verify references/fast-lane-escape-conditions.md enumerates 6 escape conditions per ADR-009 D3 item 4
evals.expected_behavior: References file contains >= 6 numbered/listed escape conditions

evals.name: workflow-verdict-then-escape-check
evals.prompt: Verify Workflow describes 'check escape after every verdict before continuing'
evals.expected_behavior: Workflow section has >= 5 numbered steps and explicitly mentions verdict-then-escape ordering
assertions: Workflow section regex matches verdict.*escape OR escape.*verdict OR verdict.*后.*检查 OR after.*verdict.*check

comparison_baseline_note: Without these evals, an author could write 'hf-ultrawork SKILL.md follows ADR-009 D2 boundaries' and pass audit-skill-anatomy.py (which only checks anatomy structural compliance, not domain rules). With these evals, the FR-008 5-keyword enumeration becomes runtime-enforced; the test suite explicitly fails if a future edit collapses the 5 enumerated rows to 'see ADR-009 D2' shorthand.
dogfood_evidence_ref: features/002-omo-inspired-v0.6/progress.md ## Fast Lane Decisions section (19 audit trail rows; 0 escape triggers)
